name: community-html-ppt-studio
title: HTML PPT Studio
description: Token-driven HTML deck studio — 36 themes × 31 layouts × 27 animations from lewislulu/html-ppt-skill in a single-file seed. One token sheet drives every skin: press T to restyle the whole deck, arrows to navigate, #/N hash deep links. Use for presentations, tech-sharing decks, pitch decks, reports, or any multi-slide document with switchable visual themes.

description_i18n.en: Token-driven HTML deck studio — 36 themes × 31 layouts × 27 animations from lewislulu/html-ppt-skill in a single-file seed. One token sheet drives every skin: press T to restyle the whole deck, arrows to navigate, #/N hash deep links. Use for presentations, tech-sharing decks, pitch decks, reports, or any multi-slide document with switchable visual themes.
description_i18n.zh-CN: Token 驱动的 HTML 幻灯片工作室——来自 lewislulu/html-ppt-skill 的 36 主题 × 31 版式 × 27 动效，打包为单文件种子。一张 token 表驱动所有皮肤：按 T 整套换肤，方向键翻页，#/N 哈希直达。适用于演示、技术分享、融资路演、汇报等任何需要可切换视觉主题的多页幻灯片。

query.en: Create a {{deckType}} as a token-driven single-file HTML deck for {{audience}} about {{topic}}, {{slideCount}}, using the {{theme}} theme. Start from the html-ppt-studio seed `example.html`: keep its token sheet, six embedded theme blocks, horizontal scroll-snap slide scaffold, fixed chrome, and keyboard runtime (arrows/Space navigation, T theme cycling, #/N hash routing) exactly as-is — replace slide content only, never rewrite the design system or the script. Set the chosen theme as the initial `data-theme` on `<html>`; if it is not one of the six embedded themes, add a `html[data-theme="<name>"]` token block ported from the upstream theme catalog in SKILL.md before using it. Compose pages from the 31-layout catalog (cover → toc → section dividers → content layouts → cta/thanks), keep exactly one screen per slide with no internal scrolling, rebuild any charts in pure CSS or inline SVG (no chart libraries, no external images), write real content with no lorem ipsum, and put 1–3 sentences of speaker notes in each slide's hidden `.notes` block.
query.zh-CN: 为 {{audience}} 制作一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（{{slideCount}}，主题 {{theme}}）：token 驱动的单文件 HTML 幻灯片。从种子 example.html 出发，完整保留 token 表、内嵌主题块、横向滚动骨架和键盘运行时（方向键翻页、T 换肤、#/N 哈希路由），只替换幻灯片内容；版式从 SKILL.md 的 31 版式目录中选取，一屏一卡不滚动，图表用纯 CSS/SVG 重建，真实内容不用 lorem ipsum，每页在隐藏的 .notes 里写演讲备注。其余细节遵循英文 query。

exampleOutputs.title: HTML PPT Studio · Theme × Layout Demo Deck

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: Engineers, execs, students, VCs, 小红书读者…
